flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southeast Arkansas College rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.9k → $5.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southeast Arkansas College rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.7k → $8.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Southeast Arkansas College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (18.2% vs 24.9%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Southeast Arkansas College rose 271% between 2009 and 2010 (4.0% → 14.9%).
